headline: MetLife Leadership Moves And Ratings Offer Context For Recent Share Performance
summary: MetLife appointed Andrea Drasites to lead MetLife Investment Management’s global Real Estate and Agricultural Finance business following its PineBridge Investments acquisition. Jordan Canter was named head of Federal Government Affairs and Regulatory Policy, expanding the insurer’s Washington presence. MetLife was recognized on Fortune’s 100 Best Companies to Work For list, highlighting its workplace culture. AM Best reaffirmed MetLife’s financial strength ratings as superior, underscoring...

headline: Assessing MetLife (MET) Valuation After Recent Share Volatility And Longer Term Returns
summary: Event context and recent share performance MetLife (MET) has attracted investor attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing mixed short term performance, including a 0.6% decline over the past day and a modest gain over the past week. See our latest analysis for MetLife. Beyond the latest moves, MetLife’s share price return has been weak over recent months. The 90 day and year to date share price returns of 11.95% and 11.95% declines contrast with a 3 year total...
